# services.kea

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.kea`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.kea.ctrl-agent` | `submodule` | Kea Control Agent configuration |
| `services.kea.ctrl-agent.configFile` | `null or absolute path` | Kea Control Agent configuration as a path, see <https://kea.readthedocs.io/en/kea-3.0.3/arm/agent.html>. Takes preference over [settings](#opt-services.kea.ctrl-agent.settings). Most users should prefer using [settings](#opt-services.kea.ctrl-agent.settings) instead. |
| `services.kea.ctrl-agent.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Kea Control Agent. |
| `services.kea.ctrl-agent.extraArgs` | `list of string` | List of additional arguments to pass to the daemon. |
| `services.kea.ctrl-agent.settings` | `JSON value` | Kea Control Agent configuration as an attribute set, see <https://kea.readthedocs.io/en/kea-3.0.3/arm/agent.html>. |
| `services.kea.dhcp-ddns` | `submodule` | Kea DHCP-DDNS configuration |
| `services.kea.dhcp-ddns.configFile` | `null or absolute path` | Kea DHCP-DDNS configuration as a path, see <https://kea.readthedocs.io/en/kea-3.0.3/arm/ddns.html>. Takes preference over [settings](#opt-services.kea.dhcp-ddns.settings). Most users should prefer using [settings](#opt-services.kea.dhcp-ddns.settings) instead. |
| `services.kea.dhcp-ddns.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Kea DDNS server. |
| `services.kea.dhcp-ddns.extraArgs` | `list of string` | List of additional arguments to pass to the daemon. |
| `services.kea.dhcp-ddns.settings` | `JSON value` | Kea DHCP-DDNS configuration as an attribute set, see <https://kea.readthedocs.io/en/kea-3.0.3/arm/ddns.html>. |
| `services.kea.dhcp4` | `submodule` | DHCP4 Server configuration |
| `services.kea.dhcp4.configFile` | `null or absolute path` | Kea DHCP4 configuration as a path, see <https://kea.readthedocs.io/en/kea-3.0.3/arm/dhcp4-srv.html>. Takes preference over [settings](#opt-services.kea.dhcp4.settings). Most users should prefer using [settings](#opt-services.kea.dhcp4.settings) instead. |
| `services.kea.dhcp4.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Kea DHCP4 server. |
| `services.kea.dhcp4.extraArgs` | `list of string` | List of additional arguments to pass to the daemon. |
| `services.kea.dhcp4.settings` | `JSON value` | Kea DHCP4 configuration as an attribute set, see <https://kea.readthedocs.io/en/kea-3.0.3/arm/dhcp4-srv.html>. |
| `services.kea.dhcp6` | `submodule` | DHCP6 Server configuration |
| `services.kea.dhcp6.configFile` | `null or absolute path` | Kea DHCP6 configuration as a path, see <https://kea.readthedocs.io/en/kea-3.0.3/arm/dhcp6-srv.html>. Takes preference over [settings](#opt-services.kea.dhcp6.settings). Most users should prefer using [settings](#opt-services.kea.dhcp6.settings) instead. |
| `services.kea.dhcp6.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Kea DHCP6 server. |
| `services.kea.dhcp6.extraArgs` | `list of string` | List of additional arguments to pass to the daemon. |
| `services.kea.dhcp6.settings` | `JSON value` | Kea DHCP6 configuration as an attribute set, see <https://kea.readthedocs.io/en/kea-3.0.3/arm/dhcp6-srv.html>. |
| `services.kea.package` | `package` | The kea package to use. |
